summary: Iteration 246: Complete testing of Pipeline Intelligence Layer features. All 3 pipeline API endpoints verified working. CRM Intelligence tab shows 6 KPIs, conversion funnel, stale deals panel, and rep performance. CRM table/kanban show STALE badges and overdue highlighting. Regression tests passed for Quote Request and Payment Review pages.

endpoints_verified: GET /api/admin/pipeline/conversion-metrics - Returns funnel array with stage, label, count, value, conversion_from_prev, plus total_leads, won_count, lost_count, win_rate, avg_days_to_close
GET /api/admin/pipeline/stale-deals - Returns stale_deals array with days_inactive and threshold_days for inactive leads
GET /api/admin/pipeline/rep-performance - Returns reps array with rep name, total_leads, won, lost, active, pipeline_value, conversion_rate

features_verified: 6 headline KPIs: Total Leads (44), Won (1), Lost (0), Win Rate (100%), Avg Days to Close, Stale Deals (5)
Conversion Funnel with horizontal bars for each stage and conversion % from previous stage (color-coded: green >= 50%, amber >= 25%, red < 25%)
Stale Deals panel listing 5 inactive leads with 'Xd inactive' badges
Rep Conversion Performance panel showing win rate percentage per rep
'Assigned Rep' column header (not 'Owner')
Status dropdown uses text-sm font-semibold
Last Activity column shows STALE badge (red) for leads inactive beyond stage threshold
Next Follow-up column shows overdue badge (red) for past dates
Kanban cards show STALE badge with days count (e.g., 'STALE (7d)', 'STALE (28d)')
Kanban cards show assigned rep name
Kanban cards show next follow-up overdue indicator in red
Next Follow-up shows red border/background when overdue with 'OVERDUE: date' text
Timeline section shows stage changes
Create Quote button visible
'Assign Sales Rep' placeholder in dropdown

hooks_verified: sales_routes.py line ~406: on_quote_created hook after quote insert - advances lead to quote_sent
live_commerce_service.py line ~840: on_payment_approved hook after payment approval - advances lead to won

features_verified: 3-step progress indicator (What you need, Timeline, Contact)
4 need type cards (Products, Promotional, Services, Other)
Step 2 Timeline with 4 urgency options (Flexible, Within a month, Within a week, Urgent)
Budget range dropdown
Canonical 5-section layout in drawer
Section 1: Status Banner (Pending Review)
Section 2: PAYER DETAILS (Payer Name, Phone, Email)
Section 3: CUSTOMER / ACCOUNT
Section 4: INVOICE / REFERENCE (Invoice No., Expected Amount, Amount Paid, Payment Mode, Submitted, View Invoice link)
Section 5: PAYMENT PROOF (file card with filename and Open link for PDF)

critical_code_review_comments: pipeline_intelligence_service.py properly implements STALE_THRESHOLDS for each stage (new_lead: 3d, contacted: 5d, qualified: 5d, meeting_demo: 5d, quote_sent: 3d, negotiation: 5d)
CRMPageV2.jsx correctly fetches all 3 pipeline endpoints in parallel via Promise.all in loadIntelligence()
Auto-stage hooks properly integrated in sales_routes.py and live_commerce_service.py with try/catch for graceful failure
Conversion funnel visualization uses horizontal bars with width proportional to count and color-coded conversion percentages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 246 verified Pipeline Intelligence Layer: (1) 3 API endpoints at /api/admin/pipeline/ for conversion-metrics, stale-deals, rep-performance. (2) CRM Intelligence tab with 6 KPIs, conversion funnel, stale deals panel, rep performance. (3) STALE badges in table and kanban with days count. (4) Overdue highlighting in table, kanban, and drawer. (5) Auto-stage hooks in sales_routes.py (on_quote_created) and live_commerce_service.py (on_payment_approved). (6) Regression tests passed for /request-quote and /admin/payments.
